raskolnikov.name: Rodion Romanovich Raskolnikov
raskolnikov.spoilerFreeIntro: A young, impoverished former student wandering the streets of St. Petersburg, lost in deep thought.

alyona-ivanovna.name: Alyona Ivanovna
alyona-ivanovna.spoilerFreeIntro: An old pawnbroker who lives alone on the fourth floor.

lizaveta-ivanovna.name: Lizaveta Ivanovna
lizaveta-ivanovna.spoilerFreeIntro: Lizaveta Ivanovna is the quiet, gentle sister of Alyona Ivanovna, known for her hard work and humble demeanor.

saint-petersburg.name: St. Petersburg
saint-petersburg.spoilerFreeIntro: St. Petersburg, a bustling city alive with construction and a peculiar summer stench, presses in on its weary inhabitants.

hay-market.name: Hay Market
hay-market.spoilerFreeIntro: A bustling London district known for its busy markets and colorful, crowded streets.

s_place.name: S. Place
s_place.spoilerFreeIntro: A bustling, somewhat shabby street in St. Petersburg, lined with modest lodging-houses and filled with the weary pulse of city life.

k_bridge.name: K. bridge
k_bridge.spoilerFreeIntro: A bridge in St. Petersburg, quietly spanning the river near the lodging houses.

jack_the_giantkiller.name: Jack the Giant-killer
jack_the_giantkiller.spoilerFreeIntro: A legendary folk hero famed for outwitting enormous foes.

the_young_mans_landlady.name: the young man's landlady
the_young_mans_landlady.spoilerFreeIntro: The young man's landlady, a woman who manages the rooms in the large, five-storied house, appears only briefly as he tries to avoid her.

the_german_clerk.name: the German clerk
the_german_clerk.spoilerFreeIntro: A German clerk in the civil service, recently vacating his flat with his family.

the_drunk_man_in_the_waggon.name: the drunk man in the waggon
searchTerms: the drunk man in the waggon
the_drunk_man_in_the_waggon.spoilerFreeIntro: A disheveled, drunken man lolls in a passing wagon, loudly taunting strangers on the street.

the_tavern.name: the tavern
the_tavern.spoilerFreeIntro: A modest tavern, dimly lit and nearly empty, offering shelter to a handful of late-night drinkers.

the_artisan_in_the_tavern.name: the artisan in the tavern
aliases: man who appeared to be an artisan
searchTerms: man who appeared to be an artisan
the_artisan_in_the_tavern.spoilerFreeIntro: A workingman, somewhat inebriated, sits with his companion over a pot of beer.

artisans_companion.name: artisan's companion
aliases: huge, stout man with a grey beard
searchTerms: huge, stout man with a grey beard
artisans_companion.spoilerFreeIntro: A huge, stout man with a grey beard and a short, full-skirted coat, dozing drunkenly beside his friend.

the_retired_government_clerk.name: the retired government clerk
aliases: man who looked somewhat like a retired government clerk
searchTerms: man who looked somewhat like a retired government clerk

group_with_a_girl_with_a_concertina.name: group with a girl with a concertina
searchTerms: group with a girl with a concertina
group_with_a_girl_with_a_concertina.spoilerFreeIntro: A lively group of about five men and a girl with a concertina, recently left the tavern together.

the_old_womans_sister.name: the old woman's sister
the_old_womans_sister.spoilerFreeIntro: The old woman's sister is a mysterious figure, rarely seen and mentioned with suspicion.

the_rehearsal_of_the_project.name: the rehearsal of the project
the_rehearsal_of_the_project.spoilerFreeIntro: A tense young man anxiously approaches a rehearsal of his secret project.
